notes: Standard PhD thesis structure. Word limits vary by institution (60k–100k is typical). target_words here are rough chapter targets for a 5-chapter thesis. Adjust per institution guidelines.

sections.name: abstract
sections.heading: Abstract
sections.notes: Context, gap, contributions (bulleted list), key findings, significance. Typically 1–2 pages. Stand-alone: a reader who only reads the abstract should understand what the thesis contributes.

sections.name: acknowledgements
sections.heading: Acknowledgements
sections.notes: Supervisors, committee, funders, collaborators, personal acknowledgements.

sections.name: introduction
sections.heading: Chapter 1: Introduction
sections.notes: Research context, problem statement, research questions (numbered), scope and exclusions, thesis structure overview (one paragraph per chapter). End with a contributions summary.

sections.name: literature_review
sections.heading: Chapter 2: Literature Review
sections.notes: Systematic coverage of the field. Use subheadings to organise themes. Identify gaps that justify your research questions. Synthesise — do not annotate-bibliography.

sections.name: methodology
sections.heading: Chapter 3: Methodology
sections.notes: Research paradigm, design, data sources, instruments, analysis approach, validity/reliability/trustworthiness, ethics. Justify every choice with reference to the research questions.

sections.name: results
sections.heading: Chapter 4: Results
sections.notes: Present findings without interpretation. Use subheadings per research question or theme. Tables and figures as primary vehicles. Narrate what is shown, not what it means.

sections.name: discussion
sections.heading: Chapter 5: Discussion
sections.notes: Interpret findings against research questions. Compare with literature. Explain surprises. Theoretical and practical contributions. Limitations. Future research.

sections.name: conclusion
sections.heading: Chapter 6: Conclusion
sections.notes: Restate research questions and summarise answers. Contributions (theoretical, methodological, practical). Final word count, page count, and recommendations.

sections.name: references
sections.heading: References
sections.notes: Full bibliography. Style per institution or discipline convention (APA, Harvard, Vancouver, etc.).

sections.name: appendices
sections.heading: Appendices
sections.notes: Interview transcripts, survey instruments, supplementary tables, ethics approval letters.
